reason: Custom provider fallback behavior (baseUrl → createOpenAIProvider) is implemented in code but not documented in ARCHITECTURE.md
proposedChange: Under 'Provider Resolution > Custom Provider Fallback', add: When provider='custom': 1) if config.customProvider is set → use it directly; 2) else if config.baseUrl is set → fall back to createOpenAIProvider; 3) else → throw Error('customProvider or baseUrl is required when provider="custom"')
